heading: Prerequisites
body:
Before you begin, you must:**Aws:**AWS* [Install the AWS CLI](http://docs.aws.amazon.com/cli/latest/userguide/cli-chap-install.html)

* [Configure the AWS CLI](http://docs.aws.amazon.com/cli/latest/userguide/cli-chap-configure.html#cli-quick-configuration)**Azure:**Azure* [Install azcopy](https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/storage/common/storage-use-azcopy-v10)

* [Authorize azcopy](https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/azurehttps://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/storage/common/storage-use-azcopy-v10?tabs=dnf#authorize-azcopy)**Gcp:**GCP- [Install the gcloud CLI](https://cloud.google.com/sdk/docs/install)

- [Configure the gcloud CLI](https://cloud.google.com/sdk/docs/components)* Install the mongoimport and
  mongorestore tools
